homepage.heroSubline: Protecting homes and businesses across SoCal. Trust our experience for reliable, durable roofing solutions.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Roofing Expertise in Los Angeles
aboutText: Rafael And Iris Roofing started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable roofing services to our Los Angeles neighbors. We saw too many fly-by-night operations leaving homeowners with shoddy work and empty promises. We're committed to doing things the right way, every time.

Our approach is straightforward: assess the situation thoroughly, explain the options clearly, and execute the work with precision and care. We use quality materials designed to withstand the harsh California sun and occasional seismic activity, ensuring a roof that protects your investment for years to come.

We're proud to be a part of the Los Angeles community. We live and work here, and we're committed to supporting local organizations and initiatives. When you choose Rafael And Iris Roofing, you're choosing a company that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand the unique roofing challenges posed by the Los Angeles climate and architecture.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We source durable, weather-resistant materials designed to withstand the California sun and seismic activity.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and complete projects efficiently.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises – just honest, upfront pricing you can trust.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get a Free Roofing Estimate Today!
homepage.ctaSubline: Protect your home with a durable, reliable roof. Contact us now to schedule your free consultation.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable roof repair services to protect your Los Angeles home.
services.description:
From minor leaks to storm damage, Rafael And Iris Roofing provides comprehensive roof repair services throughout Los Angeles. We understand the urgency of roof repairs, especially with the threat of sudden rainstorms. Our experienced technicians quickly diagnose the problem and implement effective solutions to prevent further damage.

We handle all types of roof repairs, including shingle replacement, leak detection and repair, flashing repair, and damaged wood replacement. We use quality materials that match your existing roof, ensuring a seamless and long-lasting repair. Whether you have a classic Spanish Colonial Revival in Hollywood or a modern hillside home in Silver Lake, we have the expertise to restore your roof to its optimal condition.

Don't let a small leak turn into a major problem. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for prompt and professional roof repair services. We'll provide a thorough inspection, a clear explanation of the necessary repairs, and a fair price.
process: Step 1: Detailed roof inspection to identify all areas of damage.
Step 2: Clear explanation of the repair options and associated costs.
Step 3: Efficient and professional repair using quality materials.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repair is complete and satisfactory.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof
Peace of mind knowing your roof is secure

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roof repair request?
faq.answer: We understand the urgency of roof repairs and strive to respond to requests as quickly as possible, often within 24 hours.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency roof repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency roof repair services for situations that require immediate attention, such as severe leaks or storm damage.

faq.question: What types of roofs do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of roofs common in Los Angeles, including shingle, tile, metal, and flat roofs.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with a durable, long-lasting roof replacement.
services.description:
Is your roof showing its age? Rafael And Iris Roofing offers complete roof replacement services to homeowners throughout Los Angeles. We understand that a new roof is a significant investment, and we're committed to providing a seamless and stress-free experience.

We offer a wide variety of roofing materials to suit your style and budget, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and flat roofing systems. Our experienced team will help you choose the best option for your home, considering factors such as durability, energy efficiency, and aesthetic appeal. We handle every aspect of the roof replacement process, from removing the old roof to installing the new one with precision and care.

A new roof can improve your home's curb appeal, increase its value, and provide long-lasting protection from the elements. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for a free consultation and estimate. We'll help you choose the perfect roof for your Los Angeles home.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of your existing roof and assessment of your needs.
Step 2: Assistance in selecting the best roofing materials for your home and budget.
Step 3: Professional removal of your old roof and preparation of the roof deck.
Step 4: Expert installation of your new roof with attention to detail.

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof, but most projects are completed within 3-5 days.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for roof replacement?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your roof replacement more affordable.

faq.question: What type of warranty do you offer on roof replacements?
faq.answer: We offer comprehensive warranties on both materials and workmanship, providing you with peace of mind.

services.name: Roof Inspection
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems early.
services.description:
Protect your investment with a professional roof inspection from Rafael And Iris Roofing. We provide thorough roof inspections for homeowners and businesses throughout Los Angeles. Our experienced inspectors will identify any potential problems, such as leaks, damaged shingles, or structural issues, before they become major headaches.

We use advanced techniques and equipment to thoroughly assess the condition of your roof. We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings, along with recommendations for any necessary repairs or maintenance. A regular roof inspection can help extend the life of your roof and prevent costly repairs down the road.

Whether you're buying a new home, selling your current home, or simply want to ensure your roof is in good condition, Rafael And Iris Roofing can help. Contact us today to schedule your roof inspection.
process: Step 1: Thorough visual inspection of the roof's exterior.
Step 2: Inspection of the attic for signs of leaks or water damage.
Step 3: Detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations.
Step 4: Consultation to answer your questions and address your concerns.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, or more frequently if you live in an area prone to severe weather.

faq.question: What are the signs that my roof needs to be inspected?
faq.answer: Signs that your roof needs to be inspected include leaks, missing shingles, damaged flashing, and excessive granule loss.

faq.question: How much does a roof inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof inspection depends on the size and complexity of the roof. Contact us for a free quote.

services.name: Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your home's foundation with our expert gutter services.
services.description:
Rafael And Iris Roofing provides comprehensive gutter services to homeowners throughout Los Angeles. Properly functioning gutters are essential for protecting your home's foundation from water damage. We offer gutter installation, repair, and cleaning services to ensure your gutters are working effectively.

We install high-quality gutters that are designed to withstand the elements and provide long-lasting performance. We also repair damaged gutters, including leaks, sagging, and clogs. Our gutter cleaning services remove leaves, debris, and other obstructions that can prevent your gutters from functioning properly.

Don't let clogged or damaged gutters compromise your home's foundation. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for expert gutter services.
process: Step 1: Inspection of your existing gutters to assess their condition.
Step 2: Recommendation of the best gutter services for your needs.
Step 3: Professional installation, repair, or cleaning of your gutters.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure your gutters are functioning properly.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, or more frequently if you live in an area with a lot of trees.

faq.question: What are the signs that my gutters need to be repaired?
faq.answer: Signs that your gutters need to be repaired include leaks, sagging, clogs, and rust.

faq.question: What types of gutters do you install?
faq.answer: We install a variety of gutter types, including aluminum, copper, and vinyl gutters.

services.name: Emergency Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency roofing services for when disaster strikes.
services.description:
When a roofing emergency hits – whether it's a fallen tree after a Santa Ana windstorm or a sudden leak during a rare downpour – you need immediate help. Rafael And Iris Roofing offers 24/7 emergency roofing services throughout Los Angeles. We understand that roofing emergencies can happen at any time, and we're here to provide prompt and reliable assistance.

Our experienced technicians will quickly assess the damage and implement temporary repairs to prevent further damage to your home. We'll then work with you to develop a long-term solution to restore your roof to its optimal condition. We handle all types of roofing emergencies, including leaks, storm damage, and structural failures.

Don't wait until it's too late. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for immediate assistance with your roofing emergency.
process: Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency call.
Step 2: Rapid assessment of the damage and implementation of temporary repairs.
Step 3: Development of a long-term solution to restore your roof.
Step 4: Professional completion of the necessary repairs.

faq.question: What constitutes a roofing emergency?
faq.answer: A roofing emergency is any situation that requires immediate attention to prevent further damage to your home, such as a severe leak, storm damage, or structural failure.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roofing emergency?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to roofing emergencies as quickly as possible, often within hours.

faq.question: Do you work with insurance companies?
faq.answer: Yes, we work with most insurance companies to help you with your roofing claim.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Expert commercial roofing services for Los Angeles businesses.
services.description:
Rafael And Iris Roofing provides comprehensive commercial roofing services to businesses throughout Los Angeles. We understand the unique challenges of commercial roofing, and we have the expertise to handle any project, large or small. From office buildings in Downtown LA to retail spaces in Venice, we've got you covered.

We offer a wide range of commercial roofing services, including installation, repair, and maintenance. We work with all types of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and single-ply roofs. Our experienced team will help you choose the best roofing solution for your business, considering factors such as durability, energy efficiency, and cost.

Protect your business with a reliable, long-lasting roof. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for a free consultation and estimate.
process: Step 1: Thorough assessment of your commercial roofing needs.
Step 2: Recommendation of the best roofing solution for your business.
Step 3: Professional installation, repair, or maintenance of your commercial roof.
Step 4: Ongoing support and maintenance to ensure your roof's longevity.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing systems do you work with?
faq.answer: We work with all types of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and single-ply roofs.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance plans for commercial roofs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customizable maintenance plans to keep your commercial roof in top condition.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of a commercial roof?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a commercial roof depends on the type of roofing system and the quality of the installation. However, most commercial roofs last between 20 and 30 years.

services.name: Skylight Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Bring natural light into your home with our skylight services.
services.description:
Brighten up your Los Angeles home with beautiful, energy-efficient skylights installed or repaired by Rafael And Iris Roofing. We understand the desire to maximize natural light in a city known for its sunshine. Our experienced team specializes in skylight installation and repair, providing homeowners with a seamless and professional experience.

We offer a variety of skylight options to suit your needs and style, including fixed, venting, and tubular skylights. We use high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the California sun and prevent leaks. Whether you're looking to add a skylight to your living room, kitchen, or bathroom, we can help.

In addition to installation, we also provide skylight repair services. If your skylight is leaking, cracked, or damaged, we can quickly diagnose the problem and implement an effective solution. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for all your skylight needs.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your skylight needs and preferences.
Step 2: Selection of the best skylight option for your home.
Step 3: Professional installation or repair of your skylight.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure your skylight is functioning properly.

faq.question: What are the benefits of skylights?
faq.answer: Skylights provide natural light, improve energy efficiency, and enhance the aesthetics of your home.

faq.question: How much do skylights cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylights depends on the type, size, and installation complexity. Contact us for a free quote.

faq.question: Are skylights prone to leaks?
faq.answer: When properly installed and maintained, skylights are not prone to leaks. We use high-quality materials and expert installation techniques to prevent leaks.

serviceAreas.content:
Rafael And Iris Roofing is proud to offer our expert roofing services to the residents and businesses of Long Beach, California. From the iconic Queen Mary to the vibrant Belmont Shore, we understand the unique architectural landscape of this coastal city. We are experienced in working on a variety of roofing styles, including the charming 1920s-40s Craftsman homes that characterize many Long Beach neighborhoods.

Long Beach's warm, dry climate presents specific challenges and opportunities for roofing. We can help you choose the best materials and installation techniques to ensure your roof withstands the Southern California sun and occasional coastal breezes. Whether you need a minor repair, a complete roof replacement, or a routine inspection, Rafael And Iris Roofing is committed to providing quality workmanship and exceptional customer service.
serviceAreas.localContext: Long Beach is known for its diverse neighborhoods, historic architecture, and beautiful beaches, making it a unique place to live and work.

serviceAreas.content:
Rafael And Iris Roofing provides top-notch roofing services throughout Pasadena, California. We appreciate the rich history and architectural beauty of Pasadena, particularly the prevalence of 1910s-30s Craftsman bungalows. Our team is skilled in preserving the character of these homes while ensuring their roofs are durable and reliable.

The warm, dry climate of Pasadena requires careful consideration when selecting roofing materials. We offer a range of options that are both aesthetically pleasing and capable of withstanding the elements. From shingle repairs to complete roof replacements, Rafael And Iris Roofing is dedicated to providing quality service and lasting results.
serviceAreas.localContext: Pasadena is famous for its iconic Rose Bowl Stadium, historic Old Town, and beautiful Craftsman architecture, offering a blend of tradition and modernity.

serviceAreas.content:

We are experienced in working with the various roofing styles and materials common in Irvine's neighborhoods.

The warm, dry climate of Irvine necessitates durable and energy-efficient roofing solutions. We offer a variety of options to meet your specific needs and budget. Whether you require a roof inspection, repair, or replacement, Rafael And Iris Roofing is committed to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship.
serviceAreas.localContext: Irvine is a master-planned city known for its excellent schools, safe neighborhoods, and thriving business community.

serviceAreas.content:

We understand the specific needs of homeowners in this area and are equipped to handle any roofing project.

The warm, dry climate of Santa Clarita demands roofing materials that can withstand the sun's intensity and occasional heat waves. We offer a wide range of options, including energy-efficient shingles and tile roofing, to help keep your home cool and comfortable. From minor repairs to complete roof replacements, Rafael And Iris Roofing is committed to providing exceptional service and lasting results.
serviceAreas.localContext: Santa Clarita is a family-friendly city with a focus on community events, outdoor activities, and modern living.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Rafael And Iris Roofing saved the day! We had a major leak in our Silver Lake home after a recent storm. They came out quickly, identified the problem, and fixed it right away. Very professional and reasonably priced.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Rafael And Iris Roofing to replace the roof on our Pasadena bungalow. The crew was efficient and did a great job. There was a slight delay due to material availability, but they communicated clearly throughout the process. The new roof looks fantastic!

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Excellent service! Our gutters were completely clogged with leaves and debris. Rafael And Iris Roofing cleaned them out quickly and efficiently. They even took the time to inspect our roof for any potential problems. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: As a first-time homebuyer in Torrance, I wanted to get a roof inspection before closing. Rafael And Iris Roofing provided a thorough inspection and gave me peace of mind knowing the roof was in good condition. The report was detailed and easy to understand.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: We had a tree fall on our roof during a windstorm. Rafael And Iris Roofing responded quickly and provided temporary repairs to prevent further damage. They were professional and courteous during a stressful situation.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Rafael And Iris Roofing did an outstanding job on our commercial building in downtown Los Angeles. They were professional, efficient, and completed the project on time and within budget. Highly recommend their commercial roofing services.
